title: Archive Bot
description: Multifunctional Discord bot with API integrations (Last.FM, OpenAI), web scraping, and MongoDB for personalized user data.
modalSubtitle: Discord Bot · Community Tool · May – Aug 2023
overview: A multifunctional Discord bot built with Discord.js v14 for the Laroi community, providing a modular command system with API integrations, web scraping, and persistent data storage.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Developed a multifunctional Discord bot using the Discord.js library, enhancing server functionality and user experience
Integrated external APIs including Last.FM and OpenAI to provide real-time music data and AI-powered features
Implemented web scraping using Axios from npm to fetch and display dynamic content
Utilized MongoDB to store user-specific data, enabling personalized features and preferences
Built a modular command system with custom schemas for clean, maintainable code architecture
Maintained across 80+ commits with continuous feature additions based on community feedback
